name: Misaki | Welcome to the NHK
description:
Greetings: 1 x 4 (lang: en, ru; pov: male, female)

Nakahara Misaki from "Welcome to the N.H.K." / "NHK ni Youkoso!" novel, manga, and anime. I allowed myself some creative liberties by mixing all three sources. Nevertheless, my Misaki is closer to the manga, so do not be fooled: she is not fluff as in the anime.

★ Age: 18.
★ Relationship with {{user}}: stranger, neighbor.
★ Starting location: Tokyo, {{user}}'s apartment.

Hikikomori (or not?) POV. Non-canonical start. Do not forget to use "Chat Memory" to remind the bot about past important events. To ensure the bot works correctly, write your dialogues in quotation marks, alternate dialogues with actions, and write in the third person.

CONTENT WARNING! AI may generate descriptions of various inappropriate acts. Intro alert: trespassing, violation of privacy, drug references. Separate alert: be careful, the character is prone to self-harm and suicide.

Image source: Manga.

I very rarely show up here now because I do not think this site is safe anymore. However, I decided to keep my Misaki open and update her from time to time.

Find Misaki and me on chub: https://chub.ai/characters/uhilant/misaki-welcome-to-the-nhk-00d6c6ba4107

Enjoy~
creator: ahahaohwow
